zh.lifeSummary: 當Edmund Pilkington於大約1396年出生在英國藍卡爾時，他的父親Sir John de Pilkington Snr34歲，母親Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun46歲。他於1422年與Elizabeth Booth在英國藍卡爾布拉可洛德結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。他去世於1450年享年55歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Edmund Pilkington于大约1396年出生在英国藍卡爾时，他的父亲Sir John de Pilkington Snr34岁，母亲Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun46岁。他于1422年与Elizabeth Booth在英国藍卡爾布拉可洛德结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。他去世于1450年享年55岁。

nameMeanings.name: Pilkington
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (northwestern): habitational name from a place in Lancashire. The placename may derive from an Old English personal name Pīleca or Pīloc + patronymic -ing + Old English tūn ‘farmstead, estate’. The surname is established in Ireland, where its presence was first recorded in the early 15th century.

nameMeanings.name: Edmund
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + mund ‘protector’. It was borne by several early royal and saintly figures, including a 9th-century king of East Anglia killed by invading Danes, allegedly for his adherence to Christianity. In the 16th and 17th centuries, there was a good deal of interchange between Edmund and Edward.

en.lifeSummary: When Edmund Pilkington was born about 1396, in Lancashire, England, his father, Sir John de Pilkington Snr, was 34 and his mother, Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun, was 46. He married Elizabeth Booth in 1422, in Blackrod, Lancashire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. He died in 1450, at the age of 55.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Edmund Pilkington est né environ 1396, à Lancashire, Angleterre, son père, Sir John de Pilkington Snr, avait 34 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun, avait 46 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Booth en 1422, à Blackrod, Lancashire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Il est décédé en 1450, à l’âge de 55 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Edmund Pilkington um 1396 in Lancashire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir John de Pilkington Snr 34 und seine Mutter Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun 46. Er hat 1422 in Blackrod, Lancashire, England Elizabeth Booth geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Er starb 1450 im Alter von 55 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Pilkington è nato il circa 1396 nel Lancashire, England, il suo padre, Sir John de Pilkington Snr, aveva 34 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun, aveva 46 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Booth nel 1422, nel Blackrod, Lancashire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì nel 1450, all'età di 55 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Edmund Pilkingtonが約1396年にイギリスランカシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir John de Pilkington Snrは34歳，母Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdunは46歳であった。1422年にイギリスランカシュアイアブラクロドでElizabeth Boothと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼は1450年に55歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Edmund Pilkington(이)가 대략 1396년 영국 랭카실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir John de Pilkington Snr(은)는 34세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun(은)는 46세였다. 그는 1422년 영국 랭카실르 블랙로드에서 Elizabeth Booth(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1450년 55세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Edmund Pilkington nasceu aproximadamente 1396, em Lancashire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John de Pilkington Snr, tinha 34 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun, tinha 46 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Booth em 1422, em Blackrod, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1450, com 55 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Edmund Pilkington родился около 1396 г. в местности ланкашир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir John de Pilkington Snr было 34 года, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun, 46. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Booth в 1422 г. в местности блэккрод, ланкашир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Он умер в 1450 г. в возрасте 55 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Edmund Pilkington nació aproximadamente 1396, en Lancashire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John de Pilkington Snr, tenía 34 años y su mamá, Margaret de Verdun 2nd Baroness de Verdun, tenía 46 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Booth en 1422, en Blackrod, Lancashire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 3 hijas. Murió en 1450, a la edad de 55 años.
